message:
feat: wire TranscriptWriter into Session lifecycle

NewSession creates a TranscriptWriter when StateDir is set.
RestoreSession opens an existing transcript or creates a new one.
appendTurn and appendAssistantTurn write each turn to the transcript.
Close() closes the transcript writer after MCP shutdown.
All operations are nil-safe when StateDir is empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
